Package org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.tactics

Class DetailedList

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.tactics.DetailedList
public class DetailedList extends Object
Instances of this class represent two list of strings. An main list and a second list which display details when a string in the main list is selected. The details is provided by an instance of IDetailsProvider.

Client may add buttons on the right of the two list with method addButton(String, Listener).
See Also:
  • IDetailsProvider

    • removeSelectedElement

      public void removeSelectedElement()
      Removes all selected elements in the main list.

    • getSelection

      public String[] getSelection()
      Returns the selected items in the main list. The order of the items is unspecified. An empty array indicates that no items are selected.

    • getSelectionCount

      public int getSelectionCount()
      Returns the number of selected items in the main list.

    • setSelection

      public void setSelection(String[] selection)
      Set the selected elements in the main list.

      Create a new button and attach a given listener.
      Parameters:
      text - the text of new button
      listener - the listener which should be notified when the selection event occurs

      public void addSelectionListener(org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ISelectionChangedListener listener)
